# kvindo Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `endpoint` (String) The Kvindo Cloud API endpoint. Defaults to https://cloud-api.kvindo.com. Can also be set via KVINDO_ENDPOINT env var.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The API bearer token for authentication. Can also be set via KVINDO_TOKEN env var.
